title: Euchiton fordianus

intro: Euchiton fordianus, also known as New Zealand aster, is a small shrub native to New Zealand, characterized by its small, daisy-like flowers and thin leaves. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, exhibiting potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help in treating various conditions including wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues.
